purpose: Compact fail-closed status surface for the substitution graph correctness frontier. It summarizes the current open correctness proof cases, their referenced support surfaces, and the compact per-case frontier status rollup while preserving the aggregate substitution-graph-correctness blocker.
next_as_action: Use this compact status surface as the current substitution graph correctness handoff: support surfaces are present, all correctness cases and compact case-status handoffs remain open and accepted, and the correctness blocker is not discharged.
